falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern assumed a higher low formation; a break below this level would violate the structural support expected in that pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal's implied floor

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 41 suggests controlled volatility; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic selling rather than orderly bottoming, breaking the pattern's volatility signature

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve uninverts (10Y yield exceeds 2Y yield by >10bps) and holds for 3+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern occurred with curve deeply inverted; rapid uninversion signals recession acceleration, not the soft-landing bottom the pattern implies

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
